title: ArchitectAgentOutput
description: Output schema for the Architect Agent. On success, produces a DesignDoc. On failure, produces NeedsRefactoringFirst or ReturnedToPO.

oneOf.title: NeedsRefactoringFirst
oneOf.description: Essential refactoring required before this WorkItem can proceed, and it falls outside current scope.

justification.description: Why the WorkItem cannot proceed without this refactoring

prerequisiteIssue.description: GitHub issue number created for the prerequisite refactoring

oneOf.title: ReturnedToPO
oneOf.description: Catch-all for requirements gaps, untestable criteria, unresolvable behavior change ambiguity, or mixed concerns.
